items.title: Crumbling NHS Hospitals to Face More Years of Risk and Cost
items.description: Seven hospitals with dangerous RAAC concrete won't be replaced until 2032-2033, costing up to £140 million extra per year of delay. Medscape News UK

items.title: Sexual Dysfunction in Digestive Diseases Often Missed
items.description: Digestive diseases and treatments may affect sexual function; however, clinicians address these concerns in a minority of patients despite unmet needs...

items.title: Antibiotics After GI Infections Raise IBS Risk
items.description: Use of antibiotics is linked to a higher risk of developing irritable bowel syndrome, especially when antibiotics are taken for gastrointestinal infec...

items.title: Sleep Apnea in Women Often Missed After Menopause
items.description: Sleep apnea in women may increase after menopause, yet atypical symptoms and low clinical suspicion delay diagnosis in routine practice. Medscape News...

items.title: Doctors Being ‘Pushed to the Limit’: Poll
items.description: MDU survey of 1100 doctors in England finds nearly half report poor mental or physical health, with fatigue linked to patient harm. Press Association
